This directory contains GitHub-specific configuration files and templates for the ArchSpine mirror system. It standardizes issue reporting, pull request submissions, and automates continuous integration and delivery. The notable children are grouped into three areas: **ISSUE_TEMPLATE** (bug reports, documentation improvements, feature requests), **pull_request_template.md** (describing changes, motivation, testing steps, documentation impact), and **workflows** (CI/CD pipelines for linting, building, testing, packaging, protocol asset validation, documentation build validation, smoke checks, and on-demand research tests across multiple Node.js versions). The most important implementation areas are ensuring consistency in issue tracking, maintaining high-quality pull request submissions, and automating release readiness checks.
